message: Node started: Identify and provide the universal De Giorgi exponent formula for dissipative PDEs characterized by diffusion order s in dimension n. Your answer must be a single formula. To ensure accuracy, verify that this formula correctly predicts the scaling/exponent for the following six specific systems: 3D Navier-Stokes, 2D Navier-Stokes, 1D Burgers, Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equations, Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD), and fractional Navier-Stokes. Provide the result in the format: FINAL_ANSWER: <formula> JUSTIFICATION: <brief explanation of how it applies to the listed PDEs>
